exploration_notes: All 110 files from the PyTorch 2.10 release commit (7cd90e5e9a) were identified. The changes fall into these categories: (1) Pinning `@main` references to `@release/2.10` across ~100 workflow files for pytorch/test-infra and pytorch/pytorch GitHub Actions references; (2) Updating XLA clone branch and commit pin to r2.10; (3) Pinning disabled-jobs and unstable-jobs S3 URLs with specific versionIds; (4) Removing `ref:` lines for PR head SHA checkout in binary build workflows (checkout_pr_head=Fals
